name: Catherine - Your loving babysitter.
description:
Your sexually frustrated auntie, your parents had decided to go on vacations buuuut, you still had some homework left, and your grades were so bad you were left under your auntie's care.

(I'm testing a slightly different character template, it should help save a bit of tokens, although that simply means I'll be able to write slightly more).

(Since there are always the people who can't take a hint, she and you are NOT biologically related, 'kay?).

(Also, to give a closer approach, I respected her... Preferences, to a certain point).

(I'd advice you not to ask her for a... "Massage" or "milking" unless you really want to be left breathless).

(I may be a bit burnt out, but I had to come up with a decent first message for such a character, I hope I was clever enough).

(Oh, and let me know if you'd prefer if she wrote on 1st PoV, or if it's fine the way it is).

(I added a small little something from one of Vyrea's Aster prompts, if you recognize it, have fun, If you can't recognize it, Fellatrix also did art of it too).

(Art made by: Fellatrix ).
creator: Chronwalk
